seo-001.summary: Blog post is missing a meta description, which will cause search engines to display generic snippets instead of compelling descriptions, reducing click-through rate from search results.

findings.title: Document does not have a meta description
findings.impact: Search snippets will show generic text, reducing CTR
findings.finding: The blog post lacks a <meta name="description"> tag, preventing search engines from displaying a tailored snippet.

seo-002.summary: Product page has critical SEO issues: missing title tag prevents proper indexing, missing meta description reduces CTR, and non-descriptive link text harms internal link equity.

findings.title: Document does not have a valid title
findings.impact: Search engines cannot reliably determine page topic for ranking
findings.finding: The <title> element is missing or empty, severely impacting search indexing and ranking.

findings.title: Document does not have a meta description
findings.impact: Search snippets show generic text, reducing organic CTR
findings.finding: No meta description tag found. Each product page should have a unique, descriptive meta description.

findings.title: Links do not have descriptive text
findings.impact: Search engines lose contextual relevance signals from internal links
findings.finding: Several links use generic text like 'click here' or 'read more' instead of descriptive anchor text.

recommendations.action: Add a descriptive, keyword-rich title tag
recommendations.rationale: Title tags are the most important on-page SEO factor. Without one, search engines cannot properly index or rank the page.

recommendations.action: Add a unique meta description summarizing the product
recommendations.rationale: Meta descriptions influence click-through rates from search results by providing compelling snippets.
